title: bromus diandrus var. rigidus
intro: Bromus diandrus var. rigidus, also known as the rigid brome, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant has been used to treat a range of health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
